name: X Video to Vertical Social Cut
description: Turn an X/Twitter video or local source clip into a verified 9:16 social export using the proven direct FFmpeg/run-command media path: preserve widescreen foreground, dark blurred background, burned-in captions, and no persistent header by default.
triggers: make a vertical captioned clip from this x video
turn this twitter video into a tiktok style video
make a no-header vertical clip from this video
create a 9:16 social cut with captions

Raul-approved, audit-grounded fast path for X/Twitter captioned vertical social cuts.
Frederick James X source recovery, Windows FFmpeg path safety, artifact-root and STT guards
